# Diffmint CLI

Policy-driven, local-first code review from the terminal.

## Install

```bash
npm install -g @unpijs/dm
```

## Common commands

```bash
dm auth login
dm doctor
dm review --staged
dm review --base origin/main
dm explain src/app/page.tsx
dm tests src/lib/review.ts
dm history
```

## Control plane

- Dashboard: https://diffmint.deplio.app/dashboard/overview
- Install guide: https://diffmint.deplio.app/docs/getting-started/install-cli
- VS Code guide: https://diffmint.deplio.app/docs/getting-started/install-vscode-extension
